title: JUSTOYOU 2pcs 7.8FT Double Color Artificial Blue Fake Rose Garland Vines Hanging Silk Flowers Artificial Flower for Outdoor Indoor Wedding Wall Badroom Decoration (Blue, 13 Heads)
features: Artificial rose garland, well made and colorful, looks real. Perfect decoration for any place you like. Vivid realistic decor for your home all year round, bring the atmosphere of nature.
Quantity and Size: There are 2 packs artificial rose flower garland in our package. One garland total length 240cm, 2pcs total 15.6ft. Rose flower head about 6cm diameter.

These artificial fake rose garlands feature two-color rose flower head. Each fake hanging garland has 13pcs rose heads with artificial green leaves. Easy to attach and anywhere you want to enjoy it with artificial hanging flower decoration.

Durable and Reusable: The rose flowers and leaves are made of fine fabric, the stems are made of plastic. They are soft and can be easily bent or trimmed as needed. These garlands can be twined around railings or doors to create a romantic feel.

Scenes : Artificial hanging rose garland is suitable for wedding party, centerpiece decoration, shop window, shop, restaurant, office, flower basket, party, aisle, fence and many other events. You can buy multiple garlands together if you want to create great decor effects!
